purpose: Makes hci_cmd_sync_queue return an error when HCI_UNREGISTER is set so commands are not queued after hci_unregister_dev, preventing use-after-free of the hdev after timeout.

Removes a lone asm/termios.h include from drivers/char/n_hdlc.c because linux/tty.h already pulls linux/termios.h; simplifies and normalizes header usage to avoid unnecessary/odd include of asm/termios.h.
Updates perf c2c documentation to reflect the addition of the 'N/A' store metric, modifying the report table and explanatory text so users see the new metric for store operations.

Fixes hugetlb vma-lock handling: allocate a new vma lock for vm_area_dup when splitting vmas, ensure vma locks are used as a condition for pmd sharing, and free the vma lock during range unmapping instead of clearing VM_MAYSHARE to avoid races and double-free issues.
Adds AVDD and MICVDD regulator supply entries to the realtek,rt5682s device-tree binding, documenting supplies already used by an existing DTSI (clarifies hardware wiring and binding requirements).
Adds the missing iounmap() in zorro7xx_remove_one() to undo an ioremap() that may have been performed in probe error paths, closing a resource leak on device removal.
Removes an unused 'work' field from struct mlx5e_async_ctx in the net/mlx5e kTLS code, eliminating dead data and simplifying the driver structure.
Change cfg80211_auth_request.key_idx to a signed type so it can hold -1 when no key is used (range -1..3), avoiding static-checker warnings and matching the actual semantic range.
Non-functional change that alphabetically/syntactically sorts CONFIG_SURFACE_PLATFORMS in RISC-V defconfigs to match savedefconfig output; purely formatting/configuration ordering for consistency.
Introduces mcp251xfd_is_fd_mode() and replaces duplicated inline checks with this helper to centralize CAN-FD mode detection in the mcp251xfd driver.
Changes RTC selftests so they skip execution when no RTC device is present instead of failing; this adjusts test behavior to match environment capabilities without changing kernel functionality.
Removes a dead/ redundant assignment to variable 'bytes' in echoaudio midi.c that was overwritten later, addressing a clang scan dead-store warning and cleaning up the code.
Decouples rcuscale from RCU Tasks so rcuscale can be built without forcing RCU Tasks (avoiding unnecessary RCU Tasks builds when CONFIG_PREEMPT_NONE=y), reducing kernel size and tracing complexity.
Removes a duplicated word in a KVM header comment (spte.h) changing "be split be split" to "be split"; purely a documentation/text cleanup with no code or behavioral change.

Reverts the change that populated the DCN315 clock table from dcfclk values because pmfw behavior with dcfclk disabled caused a 'no read' / underflow; the revert prevents that runtime issue until a proper fix is implemented.
Adds a device-tree binding entry (compatible string) documenting the Renesas RZ/V2L SoC which uses a Bifrost Mali-G31 GPU so the GPU driver and DT can match this SoC.

Renames struct pcie_port to dw_pcie_rp in the DesignWare PCIe driver to follow the 'dw_' prefix and naming conventions, aligning this struct with other driver entities for clearer namespace separation.
Adjusts the printk format specifier for ntohs(eth->h_proto) to match integer promotion (use %x), resolving a Clang -Wformat warning and aligning with printk-format documentation.

Adjusts a branch-range check by casting the upper bound to long so the comparison is signed, preventing negative offsets from triggering a compiler warning and aligning the check with intended semantics.
Removes the HW_VAR_H2C_FW_P2P_PS_OFFLOAD case from SetHwReg8188EU and calls the underlying function directly, as part of eliminating the HAL indirection in the r8188eu staging driver.

Marks previously non-global symbols as static in arm64 cpu_errata code to silence sparse warnings introduced when adding errata, tightening symbol visibility and scope without changing runtime behavior.
Removes the incorrect interrupt flags cell from MDSS consumer nodes in the display DT bindings because the MDSS interrupt provider uses a single-cell spec; clarifies and corrects binding semantics.

Modifies v4l2-ctrls to allocate control-reference arrays and reserve space for arrays inside struct ctrl_ref so drivers can change array sizes; a preparatory internal layout and allocation change enabling dynamic array sizing.
Adds entries for SM8350, SC8280XP, SA8540P, an additional SM8450, and various PMICs to the socinfo driver so the kernel can recognize and handle these Qualcomm SoCs and their PMICs.
Extend rtl8xxxu chip-cut handling to recognize chip version letters A(0) through P(15) so valid higher cuts are reported correctly instead of being shown as 'unknown'.
Removes the custom .is_enabled software-enable state from ux500 PRCMU clocks because the common clock core already maintains a software enable count; simplifies driver state management.

Reduces and reorganizes #ifdef CONFIG_XIP_KERNEL usage in RISC-V mm init: moves the pt_ops macro adjacent to XIP-specific code and groups XIP-only declarations, consolidating preprocessor conditionals without changing runtime behavior.
Modifies the Qualcomm sm6350-lena device tree to enable QUP and GPI DMA hardware blocks so functioning I2C nodes can be added later; a DT configuration change to activate hardware resources.

Edits comments in the rzg2l thermal driver: clarifies 'Capture times' to 'Total number of ADC data samples', corrects 'caliberation' to 'calibration', and adjusts comment formatting to meet coding style, with no functional changes.

Ensures release_swfw_sync detects failure to acquire the hardware semaphore (e.g., on surprise removal), logs an error and exits instead of spinning forever, preventing an infinite loop during resource release.
Replaces legacy bus-clock defines in the pcm3168a ASoC driver with modern ASoC DAI format terminology, aligning the driver with current ASoC APIs and clarifying clocking semantics.
Deletes a redundant IS_SWAPFILE conditional/hack from the NFS codebase because IS_SWAPFILE is always defined, cleaning up dead/pointless code without changing runtime behavior.

Adds handling of GTP Echo Request by sending GTP Echo Response with GTPIE_RECOVERY and appropriate restart counter (0 for GTPv1, user-provided for GTPv0), ensuring a GTP-U link created via ip link complies with the GTP spec.
Replaces trivial uses of cpumask_next_* with the more appropriate cpumask_first_* when starting from zero (n == -1) and introduces cpumask_first_zero(), simplifying iteration and clarifying intent.

Removes the brcmfmac call to the 'dtim_assoc' IOVAR because firmware no longer supports retrieving TIM info; prevents the failing query after STA roam that logged repeated '-52' errors on the console.

Adds a board configuration (adl_rt5682) to support the ALC5682 headset codec on platforms without a speaker amplifier, wiring the codec to SSP0 per Intel BT-offload design to enable that hardware configuration.
Makes io_uring's zerocopy sendmsg fail when the target socket/protocol does not support zerocopy, aligning sendmsg behavior with earlier zerocopy send handling to avoid unsupported zerocopy attempts.

Adjusts the kerneldoc preamble to test for xeCJK.sty before loading it, avoiding xelatex 'xeCJK.sty not found' errors on systems missing texlive-xecjk and allowing 'make pdfdocs' to succeed for non-CJK content.

Modifies scripts/checkpatch to stop flagging macros that expand to 'case' labels (e.g., '#define C2S(x) case x: return #x'), preventing incorrect 'complex macro' warnings and aligning linting with existing in-tree usage.

Replaces simpledrm's simple-KMS helpers with the regular DRM atomic helpers, improving architecture and enabling easier code sharing; removes empty CRTC helpers and runs drm_atomic_helper_check_plane_state() unconditionally. No functional behavior changes.

Adds a JPEG decode worker interface to the Mediatek mtk-jpegdec driver, enabling scheduling so three hardware decoders on MT8195 can run in parallel (introduces concurrency/support for parallel decoding).
Removes redundant VPRINTK() calls and the ata_scsi_dump_cdb() helper from libata, relying on existing tracepoints for equivalent information to reduce duplicate/pointless logging.

Adds support to enter zstate during extended vblank when entering FREESYNC_STATE_VIDEO by computing extra vblank time, allowing zstate if time gained >5ms, updating min_dst_y_next_start, and restoring defaults on exit.
Updates the hqd_destroy() callback prototype so the reset_type parameter matches existing implementations (enum kfd_preempt_type), resolving a Clang kCFI type-mismatch observed on RX 6700 XT boots.
Corrects the devicetree binding for st,stm32 pinctrl by renaming the property from 'reset' to the correct 'resets' and adding 'additionalProperties: false' to tighten the schema and validation.
Adjusts compiler warning level to silence a spurious GCC 12 array-bounds warning in ath9k's ath9k_hw_resettxqueue by relegating the warning to W=1+, keeping code behavior unchanged.
Replaces pm_runtime_get_sync with pm_runtime_resume_and_get in the sun8i-ss crypto driver to simplify runtime-PM handling and align resume semantics with intended behavior.
Moves fixed-file installation/removal into the filetable code and changes helper signatures to take a ctx instead of an io_kiocb, reorganizing io_uring internals for clearer ownership and API.

Updates media DT bindings for NXP i.MX8MQ VPU by splitting G1 and G2 into separate nodes and adding vpu-blk-ctrl power-domain support so the independent decoder blocks can be represented and controlled separately.
Inlines and removes the IWL_DEVICE_BZ_COMMON macro by merging its single usage into the IWL_DEVICE_BZ macro, simplifying the iwlwifi configuration macros without changing behavior.
